entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Ma habboon tahay shirkad enter tan suuq?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Maxaa ka dhiga dood valid?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Hage wax ku ool ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka Waxbarid Socratic ah gudaha inspir si loo barto aasaaska, oo leh prompts, wareegyo waxbarasho, iyo caadooyin AI oo ammaan badan.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ka xooggan wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Macallin AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yar koowaad step rather ka badan jawaab kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning, ma just result.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Dhis hypothesis.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish by qoraal fikrad back ka yimid xusuus.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Aasaaska

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Ardayda doonaya inay ka fikiraan mawduuc, tijaabiyaan malo-awaalka, oo dhistaan faham waara.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts si isku day

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Macallin Socratic AI loogu talagalay Deeper Understanding waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: fikrad, dood, problem, text, ama decision u beddel diiradda saaran chain ee su'aalo. kaaga saaxiib listens si kasta jawaab, khariidado assumptions iyo gaps, iyo pushes aad toward kaaga u gaar ah kama dambays synthesis. isku day:"caawin aniga understand fursad kharash."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Macallin Socratic AI loogu talagalay Deeper Understanding: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Tilmaanta Socratic

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Ka bilow qaabka tooska ah ee Waxbarid Socratic ah. Haddii aad rabto qaab waxbarasho oo u dhow, isku day Waxbarid Wadajir ah. Si aad aragti ballaaran uga hesho madasha, akhri waxa wehel waxbarasho AI uu qof walba u qaban karo.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell qaab waxa aad waa trying si baro ama produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: taas difference shows up gudaha flow. halkii ee hal giant response, ugu fiican sessions move iyada oo loo marayo loop: set yool, isku day something, get jawaab-celin, repair daciif spot, iyo dooro xiga action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: taas focus matters. general chatbot wuu karaa jawaab almost anything, laakiin qaab waxbarasho siiyaa wada-hadal shape. taas nudges aad toward kind ee thinking, tababar, jawaab-celin, ama sahan taas caawisaa fikrad stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Macalinku wuxuu weydiiyaa hal su'aal markiiba, wuxuu sugayaa sababayntaada, wuxuuna soo koobayaa oo kaliya ka dib markaad isku daydo.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: tan waa isku mid caado behind studying leh AI iyadoo aan khiyaano lahayn yourself: keep arday active. AI waa most waxtar leh marka taas siiyaa aad jawaab-celin ku kaaga thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: tan qaab waa especially waxtar leh loogu talagalay ardayda yaa rabto si:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: isku day step gudaha kaaga u gaar ah erayo.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: confusion u beddel ka cad model.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Isticmaal tilmaamo ka hor jawaabo.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Isticmaal Waxbarid Socratic ah marka aad rabto kalfadhi si degdeg ah u bilaabma isla markaana adiga kula qabsada. Yoolka koowaad ma aha in la dhawaaqo si cajaa'ib leh. Yoolka koowaad waa in tallaabada xigta laga dhigo mid suuragal u muuqata.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: waxa tan qaab caawisaa leh

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: halkee si go xiga

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: aad wuu karaa also bilow leh rough version ee kaaga dhab ah problem. messy koowaad prompt waa fine. session wuu karaa clarify heer, dhagaystayaal, waqti kama dambays ah, iyo style once aad begin.
